docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, NELSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YONG HO IND/DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION
